remaining_tasks.name: Diagnose why Import claims success when DB write fails
Plan gap closure for Test 8 failure

blockers.description: Test 8 (Import Commit Error Handling) failed during UAT. Import dialog reported success when the underlying DB write failed (read-only SQLite file). Stream was not restored but no error toast appeared.
blockers.reproduction: 1) chmod -w musicstreamer/musicstreamer.sqlite3  2) remove a stream via UI  3) run Import Settings on a prior export ZIP that contains that stream  4) observe: dialog claims success, stream not restored

decisions.rationale: audioaddict_listen_key is not persisted in DB (upstream issue outside phase 42 scope); exclusion behavior covered by automated tests in test_settings_export.py

decisions.decision: gsd-debugger spawn was INTERRUPTED by user before diagnosis ran
decisions.rationale: User paused work before the investigation started; diagnosis still pending

next_action: Run gsd-debugger against Test 8 failure. Investigate: (1) whether commit_import raises on sqlite3 OperationalError for read-only writes, (2) whether _ImportCommitWorker.run emits 'finished' even on exception, (3) whether station list refresh masks the failure. Then /gsd-plan-phase 42 --gaps to create fix plan, then /gsd-execute-phase 42 --gaps-only.
context_notes: Phase 42 functionally complete — all code/UI/security reviews cleaned up, 6/8 UAT checkpoints passed. One real bug surfaced at the UAT gate: Import reports success when it silently fails. Diagnosis was about to spawn gsd-debugger when user invoked /gsd-pause-work. An unrelated observation came up during UAT: audioaddict_listen_key isn't being persisted in the DB — NOT a phase 42 bug, but worth tracking as a separate backlog item for the settings storage path.

followups.description: audioaddict_listen_key is not being persisted in DB (observed during Test 7 setup). Phase 42 correctly excludes it from export; the storage bug is elsewhere.
